title: 7.5 inch Salad Appetizer Side Plate Set of 6, Lightweight 19cm Opal Glass Round White Plates for Dessert Kitchen, Dishwasher and Microwave Safe

Food Grade Materials: Our opal glass materials of salad plates are lead-free, cadmium-free, and BPA-free
High Resistance to Scratches: Maintains a pristine appearance over time, even with frequent use
Easy to Clean: Thanks to the non-porous ultra-hygienic surface, less detergent and energy is needed for cleaning; The appetizer plates are dishwasher, microwave and refrigerator safe
Space Saving and Lightweight: Stackable, can be neatly placed in the cupboard to save more space in your kitchen; Easier handling; Save energy in production and transportation

100% Recyclable and Stackable: Recycle our dessert plates according to your local recycling guidelines
Ideal for Gift: A great gift ideal for home décor, housewarming, wedding, family reunion or any other party
Our Commitment: Our unwavering commitment is to deliver premium, environmentally responsible products to our customers
Our Service: We're committed to a great customer experience; Any questions or concerns about our plate set; Contact our customer service; Your satisfaction is our priority
description: Product Description LaGlint 7.5 inch Side Plates Moonlight Series Elegant minimalism for everyday sophistication. Food Grade Materials Made with higher quality food-safe materials. Our opal glass materials are lead-free, cadmium-free, and BPA-free. Space Saving Stackable, can be neatly placed in the cupboard to save more space in your kitchen. Easy to Use Dishwasher, microwave and refrigerator safe. Easy to Clean Thanks to the non-porous ultra-hygienic surface, less detergent and energy is needed for cleaning. Opal glass is a kind of glass product. It has high transparency and glossiness, and its surface is smooth. Because of its beautiful appearance, it can enhance the grade of dining. Moreover, it is relatively easy to clean. Why they are more lightweight and thinner than porcelain? The material is glass not clay, so it is more lightweight and very durable for using. Stronger than porcelain. Is it easy broken? It is tougher than ordinary glass and not easy to break. Is it suitable for more places? It can withstand certain temperature changes. Why the bottom is not smooth like the surface? Because our products has matte-bottom design which prevents slipping and sliding on smooth surfaces. It offers a pleasant tactile experience when handling. Elevates everyday dining with both practical and aesthetic improvements.
